subcodes.first_line: Say: O my God, my God! I testify to Thy oneness and Thy singleness, and I acknowledge that which Thou hast revealed in Thy Book. I beseech Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل الهی الهی اشهد بوحدانیتک و فردانیتک و اعترف بما انزلته فی کتابک اسئلک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @prayer for forgiveness, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
